In the 15th year of the Kaiyuan era of Emperor Xuanzong of Tang (727), Li Bai returned from his travels eastward and arrived in Anlu, Hubei, at the age of 27. In the third month of the 18th year of Kaiyuan (730), Li Bai learned that Meng Haoran was going to Guangling (present-day Yangzhou, Jiangsu Province) and sent a message to arrange a meeting in Jiangxia (present-day Wuchang District, Wuhan).
